header.title: Naming & Style Standards
header.description: Strict semantic conventions designed to eliminate ambiguity and technical debt through static analysis.

benefit_text: Naming consistency simplifies navigation, and automated linter checks prevent architectural debt accumulation.

files.label: Files and Case:
files.text: Universally using <one>kebab-case</one>. Exceptions: hooks (<two>use</two> prefix), utility files (<three>entity.type.ts</three> format), and standard Next.js files.

typing.label: Types and Code:
typing.text: Interfaces with <one>I</one> prefix, types with <two>T</two> prefix, enums with <three>ENUM_</three> prefix. Components use <four>PascalCase</four>.

fsd_rules.title: FSD Import Architecture
fsd_rules.description: Classic layer hierarchy: <one>shared</one> is the lowest, <two>app</two> is the highest. Upward imports or imports between elements of the same layer are strictly prohibited.

relaxations.title: Technical Relaxations
relaxations.description: Specific exceptions for external libraries (shadcn-ui), type declarations (.d.ts), and system configurations where strict naming might interfere with operation.
